head.title: Somnath Dwarka 2 Days 1 Night: Who It Actually Works For
head.meta: A 2 day 1 night Somnath Dwarka plan from Rs.5,000 pp. The honest maths on what one night buys, and why it only works if you start inside Saurashtra.
head.h1: Somnath Dwarka Package 2 Days 1 Night: Itinerary, Price and Booking

quick_answer: A 2 days 1 night Somnath Dwarka package costs Rs. 5,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 10,000 at 4 star and Rs. 12,500 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and your vehicle included. One night buys you one temple town done properly. It does not buy you both, because Dwarka and Somnath sit 233 km and 5 to 6 hours apart and both shut for the afternoon. This plan is built for people already inside Saurashtra: Rajkot, Jamnagar, Veraval, Porbandar or Junagadh. If you are starting from Ahmedabad or flying in, go to the 3 days 2 nights plan instead, and we will tell you the same thing on the phone.

decision.title: The maths, before you book anything
intro: This is the section that will either save your weekend or send you to a different page.

Two days contains roughly 20 usable hours once you subtract sleep. Dwarkadhish is shut from about 1:00 pm to 5:00 pm. Somnath’s evening aarti is at 7:00 pm and the Jay Somnath sound and light show runs 7:45 pm to 8:45 pm.
Put those together and the answer is arithmetic, not opinion. From Ahmedabad, the drive alone eats 13 to 15 hours of your 20. From Rajkot, it does not, which is why this plan exists.
So we sell 2 days 1 night in exactly three shapes:
Next step: tell us your start city and we will tell you which of the three your 2 days can actually hold.

days.title: Day by day: the Dwarka focus version

steps.activity: Pickup at Rajkot or Jamnagar. Rajkot is the longer of the two, so a 09:00 start protects the evening.
Dwarka hotel check in. You have arrived inside the afternoon closure on purpose. Lunch and rest cost you nothing right now, because the temple is shut anyway.
Dwarkadhish evening darshan as the gates reopen.
Gomti Ghat, the 56 steps down, and the flag on the shikhara that gets changed through the day.

days.title: Day 2

steps.activity: Mangala Aarti at Dwarkadhish. The quietest the temple gets and the reason we hold you here overnight.
Drive to Okha and across Sudarshan Setu, the 2.32 km bridge that opened in February 2024. No ferry, no tide, no queue at the jetty.
Bet Dwarka darshan, then back across the bridge.
Nageshwar Jyotirlinga on the Dwarka to Okha road, which costs you no detour on the way back.
Rukmini Devi Temple, then drop at Jamnagar or Rajkot.

days.note: The Somnath focus version runs the same logic in reverse around the 7:00 pm aarti and the 7:45 pm show. The transfer version gives Day 2 to the coastal run through Porbandar, and you get one darshan at the far end rather than two.

rows: The Fern Sattva Resort at Dwarka, best available at Somnath
notes: Rates are per person per night, so one night is one multiple. Your vehicle is chosen by group size: sedan for 2 to 3, Ertiga for 4 to 5, Innova Crysta for 5 to 6, and tempo travellers from 9 seats to 26.
Not included: lunch and dinner, personal pooja, seva and abhishek at either temple, the sound and light show ticket, camera and cloakroom charges, tips, and anything you buy yourself.

General darshan is free at both temples. The Shree Somnath Trust accepts room bookings, pooja vidhi and donations only through its own official website and never through private numbers, WhatsApp chats or UPI transfers. We will not take that money on your behalf.

why_choose.title: Why choose Experience My India for a 2 day plan
points: We will talk you out of it. If your start city makes two days a driving competition, we say so on the call rather than selling you the booking and letting the road deliver the bad news.
We plan around the 1:00 pm closure. Your arrival is timed to land inside it on purpose, so the shut gate costs you lunch instead of a darshan.
A local Gujarat team. The people building your two days drive these roads.
One number, answered by a planner. +91 7302265809 on call and WhatsApp.
Timings verified in July 2026 against the temple trusts, and reconfirmed before your departure because festival schedules move.

Cancellation and refund terms are on the cancellation and refund page, and booking terms on the booking policy page. Read them before you pay, not after. More on the team at about us and our Gujarat team, and how we check what we publish at methodology.\FAQ

faq.question: Can you cover Somnath and Dwarka in 2 days?
faq.answer: Not both properly. They are 233 km apart, which is 5 to 6 hours of driving, and both temples close for the afternoon. Two days from inside Saurashtra buys one town done well plus a single darshan at the other. Two days from Ahmedabad buys mostly highway.

faq.question: What does a 2 days 1 night Somnath Dwarka package cost?
faq.answer: Rs. 5,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 10,000 at 4 star and Rs. 12,500 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and vehicle included.

faq.question: Is 1 night enough for Dwarka?
faq.answer: For Dwarkadhish, Nageshwar, Bet Dwarka and Rukmini Devi, yes, if you arrive by early afternoon and stay the night for the 6:30 am Mangala Aarti. That morning aarti is the whole reason to sleep in Dwarka rather than drive in and out.

faq.question: Do we still take a boat to Bet Dwarka?
faq.answer: No. Sudarshan Setu, a 2.32 km cable stayed bridge from Okha, was inaugurated on 25 February 2024. You drive across it.

faq.question: Can we add Gir to a 2 day plan?
faq.answer: No. Gir needs a dawn safari and its own night. See 5 days 4 nights, and check the closure dates before you plan it.

final_cta: Two days works from inside Saurashtra and does not work from outside it. Tell us your start city and your dates on +91 7302265809 and we will tell you honestly which of the three shapes fits, or which longer plan to take instead.
